predicates.name: is_small_company
predicates.description: The company has small-company status for the financial year.

predicates.name: is_last_closed_financial_year
predicates.description: The financial year is the company's last closed financial year.

predicates.name: employee_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the employee criterion for the financial year.

predicates.name: turnover_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the net turnover criterion for the financial year.

predicates.name: balance_sheet_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the balance sheet total criterion for the financial year.

predicates.name: more_than_one_micro_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds more than one micro-company criterion for the financial year.

predicates.name: is_micro_company
predicates.description: The company qualifies as a micro-company for the financial year.

predicates.name: referenced_small_company_provisions_apply
predicates.description: The referenced small-company provisions apply to the company for the financial year.

functions.name: annual_average_employees
functions.description: The annual average number of employees of the company in the financial year.

functions.name: annual_net_turnover_excluding_vat
functions.description: The company's annual net turnover excluding VAT for the financial year.

functions.name: balance_sheet_total
functions.description: The company's balance sheet total for the financial year.
